title: 3 skills to outrun AI salary cuts
meta_description: Protect your 2026 salary against AI automation with 3 boring engineering skills — connection pooling, circuit breakers, and CDN cache control — proven to cut outages 90% and keep clients paying premium rates.
prewritten_tweet:

The real value isn’t fast output — it’s preventing 3 AM outages.
